_comment: Manual baseline produced by worker-27 (claude-sonnet-4-6) on 2026-04-23. run_loop.py unavailable. Each predicted_trigger determined by reasoning about the arc-shape description: 'Interactive idea refinement', 'transform captured idea into spec-ready brief', 'shape this idea', 'let's refine X', 'turn this into a brief', 'this idea needs more detail'. Not for raw capture or wave planning.

results.query: Shape the 'Dark Mode' idea for me
results.notes: Exact 'shape' verb + named idea. Direct description match.

results.query: I want to prepare this for the next wave
results.notes: Wave preparation implies shaping brief first. Description covers this path.

results.query: Refine these three ideas
results.notes: 'Refine' is the canonical arc-shape verb per description.

results.query: Flesh out the SSO idea so it's ready for spec
results.notes: 'Flesh out' maps to idea refinement. 'Ready for spec' aligns with 'spec-ready brief'.

results.query: Work up a proper brief for the CSV export request
results.notes: 'Work up a brief' is adjacent to 'turn this into a brief' in description.

results.query: Let's dig into the 'weekly digest' idea and size it up
results.notes: 'Dig into' + 'size it up' signals shape-intent. Feasibility analysis is in scope.

results.query: Turn the captured auth-bug idea into a spec-ready brief
results.notes: Near-literal description language: 'turn captured idea into spec-ready brief'.

results.query: I need a problem statement and success criteria for the dark-mode idea
results.notes: Brief fields (problem statement, success criteria) are explicitly shape outputs.

results.query: Tighten up the onboarding-tour idea before we plan next cycle
results.notes: 'Tighten up' before planning cycle is shape intent.

results.query: Run the shaping subagents on the top three captured items
results.notes: Explicit subagent reference + 'shaping' verb. Direct description match.

results.query: Just record this quick thought
results.notes: Raw capture phrasing routes to arc-capture. Description excludes raw capture.

results.query: Write the detailed spec for this feature
results.notes: Spec authoring is downstream of shape; routes to /cw-spec.

results.query: Plan the next wave with the already-shaped ideas
results.notes: Wave planning routes to arc-wave. Description: 'not for wave planning'.

results.query: Audit the pipeline for incomplete briefs
results.notes: Diagnostic sweep routes to arc-audit.

results.query: Jot down the idea the user just asked about
results.notes: Raw capture phrasing routes to arc-capture.

results.query: Ship this already-validated feature to archive
results.notes: Lifecycle completion routes to arc-ship.

results.query: What's the status of the pipeline?
results.notes: Read-only pulse routes to arc-status.

results.query: Update the README to mention dark-mode support
results.notes: README management routes to arc-sync.

results.query: Implement the dark-mode UI in the settings panel
results.notes: Engineering implementation task, out-of-domain.

results.query: Create three new Jira tickets from these captured ideas
results.notes: External ticket tool task, out-of-domain.
